overview: A sports card collection tracker dashboard where you can add cards, track their purchase price and current estimated value, view price history trends, and see your full portfolio's total worth and gain/loss at a glance.
features: Add cards with player, sport, team, year, condition, purchase price, and current value
Track price history per card with line charts showing value over time
Portfolio dashboard with total cards, cost, current value, and gain/loss
Searchable and filterable card list with sorting
Card detail view with price history and editing
